name: KeepWell Morning Check-in
description: Starts the day with a brief intention-setting nudge based on the 8 dimensions of wellness.

then.prompt: Check the current system time. If this is the user's FIRST message today (morning), provide a brief KeepWell well-being nudge: one intention-setting suggestion covering Spiritual (purpose), Physical (morning movement), or Intellectual (learning goal). Keep it to 2 sentences max. Use the format: [Dimension Icon] [Suggestion] + 1-line science note. If it's not morning or the user has already been chatting, skip this entirely and do not mention it.
